title: lasthenia minor var. maritima
intro: Lasthenia minor var. maritima, also known as coast range goldfields, is a rare and endemic plant species native to the coastal regions of California in the United States. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lasthenia minor var. maritima include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine and herbalism practices.
